items.headline: Claude Code now enforces org model policies correctly
items.body: v2.1.176 patches two model-routing gaps: `availableModels` can no longer be bypassed via redirect, and auto mode falls back cleanly when Fable 5 is listed but Opus 4.8 isn't licensed. these are org-deployment correctness fixes, not cosmetic. relevant for ADO MCP Server — that server runs inside enterprise environments where model access is IT-controlled, and silent rerouting produces unexpected costs and audit exposure.
